prompt_rules: world-map coastline tiles with curved land-water boundaries
include coast edges, corners, beaches, shallow water, small wave highlights, and broken shoreline variants
avoid straight vertical or horizontal strips of water next to land

prompt:
Bright mythical-Japan satoyama palette: mossy grey stone (nozura-zumi wild-stone masonry), deep matcha and moss greens, soft warm sunlight. Top-down-OBLIQUE tall stone retaining wall (ishigaki) tileset, viewed slightly from above-and-front (~35 degrees) so the VERTICAL stone face is clearly visible and conveys height. Each rounded fieldstone is individually readable with dark mortar lines. Upper stones are brighter grey-green; lower stones are darker and more moss-covered. STRICT 4x4 LAYOUT, 16 tiles, each cell exactly 128x128 pixels, filled edge to edge, tileable. Row1 (caps / kasaishi) = the cut-stone cap band at the very top of the wall: cell0=top-left outer corner cap, cell1=straight cap (light grey-green cut stone, slightly rounded top), cell2=straight cap variation, cell3=top-right outer corner cap. Row2 (upper wall) = bright upper section of the stacked fieldstone face: cell4=left end with vertical corner detail, cell5=straight upper stone face, cell6=straight upper stone face variation with moss patch, cell7=right end with vertical corner detail. Row3 (lower wall) = darker lower section, heavier moss and lichen patches, slight lichen cracks: cell8=straight lower face, cell9=straight lower face variation, cell10=lower face with prominent moss clump, cell11=lower face with horizontal crack variation. Row4 (base) = foot of wall meeting lower ground, fieldstones with small pebbles, soil, and low grass at the base: cell12=straight base variation A, cell13=straight base variation B, cell14=left base corner with ground contact, cell15=right base corner with ground contact. No text, no characters, no grid lines.
Avoid: no Mario/Nintendo/Zelda/Final Fantasy/Pokemon/Dragon Quest/Secret of Mana/Okami/Sakuna characters, logos or likeness, no samurai armor, no kabuto helmet, no ninja outfit, no two-sword daisho, no gun, no modern objects, no horror mood, no dark gloomy palette, no bird or companion creature in the sheet, no letter emblems, no modern text/watermark/UI.
Output: crisp high-resolution 16-bit-style pixel art with fine readable pixel clusters, dark one-pixel outline, top-left light source, bright cheerful colors, solid #FF00FF magenta background filling all empty space, consistent identity and scale across frames.
